---
title: "Decision-support and benefit-cost tools"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Decision-support and benefit-cost tools | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Translation of preference and economic-evaluation evidence into interactive decision-support tools for policy and applied research."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell narrow"><p class="eyebrow">Project</p><h1>Decision-support and benefit-cost tools</h1><p class="lead">Translation of preference and economic-evaluation evidence into interactive decision-support tools for policy and applied research.</p></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Research question and relevance</h2><p>Translation of preference and economic-evaluation evidence into interactive decision-support tools for policy and applied research.</p><h2>Methods and outputs</h2><p>Methods include health economics, applied econometrics, discrete choice experiments, stated-preference methods, decision-support modelling and policy translation where relevant.</p><p><a href="/publications/">Related publications</a> · <a href="/tools/">Related tools</a></p></div></section>
```
